name: Six Feet Forward
specialty: Specializing in navigating the city's rifts, Six Feet Forward is known for their ability to secure rare and valuable artifacts from the other realms.

members.name: Eira Ironsteel
members.note: The scar on her left cheek is a constant reminder of a failed mission, giving her a stoic demeanor

members.name: Thorn Silverwing
members.note: His eyes, glowing like embers, are said to see through the shadows of the Undercity

members.name: Cogwork Sam
members.note: The gears on his back hum softly as he moves, a reminder of his mechanical origins

visual: Dressed in leather and steel, they move with purpose, their eyes scanning the crowded streets for potential work. A glowing rune on Eira's wrist marks them as a group that dares to enter the rifts.
reputation_note: Whispers in the taverns speak of a crew that can get what you need, no questions asked. But they're also rumored to have a debt with the Tower Authority, making them a dangerous ally or enemy.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a local-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
